name: Newport Exploration Ltd.
summary: Newport Exploration Ltd., a natural resource company, engages in the acquisition and exploration of resource properties. The company holds a 100% interest in the Chu Chua copper-gold project located to the north of Kamloops, British Columbia, Canada. It also holds a 2.5% gross overriding royalty interest on oil and gas permits in the Cooper Basin in Queensland, Australia. The company was incorporated in 1979 and is headquartered in West Vancouver, Canada.
